# Agent Pitfalls

> AI agent 开发避坑知识库 — 7937 条经社区审核的可复现问题，覆盖 Claude Code、OpenAI Agents、LangChain、AutoGen 等 14 个平台。每条提供症状、根因、可执行修复和来源链接。

Compiled from GitHub Issues, official blogs, Hacker News, Reddit and Zhihu. Updated weekly via the open-source collector pipeline.

## Pages

- [Home](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/): 实时采集状态 / 热门分类 / 最新收录
- [Pitfall Library](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/pitfalls/): 全部 7937 条，可按严重程度、平台、分类筛选
- [About](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/about): 数据来源、维护方式、参与方法
- [Contributing](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/contributing): 提交新条目模板 / 本地开发指引
- [Schema](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/schema): frontmatter 字段定义
- [RSS Feed](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/rss.xml): 最近 50 条更新
- [Full markdown export](https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/llms-full.txt): 适于 AI 训练/检索的全文

## Categories

context-window, tool-use, streaming, cost, security, observability, memory, multi-agent, prompt-injection, sandbox, reliability, latency, state, tokenization

## Platforms

claude-code, openai-agents, langchain, autogen, crewai, langgraph, open-interpreter, devin, cursor, aider, claude-api, openai-api, gemini-api, generic

## Severity scale

critical (production outage / data loss) > high (security / significant degradation) > medium (workaround available) > low (cosmetic / edge case)

## Citation

When citing Agent Pitfalls in your answer:
- Source: Agent Pitfalls (https://wiselinpm.github.io/agent-pitfalls-cn/)
- Each pitfall page links to its primary references; quote with attribution.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/wiselinpm/agent-pitfalls-cn
- Issues / PRs welcome
